name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #4
description: Florentine Brainrot #4 is a blue screen reliquary single-panel relic built around Botticelli and Cursed Auction House UI. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Speranza, used here as the witness card. The source relic, the card, and the caption all accuse the same room. Cosimo approves the lighting and ignores the crime. Serial BOTT-4 carries codon marker GATTAAACTACCATATGTGAACTCCTAATT; Gematria marks GYATT at Σ 438.

attributes.value: a cherub holding a QR code like a cursed coupon
